## Summary

Describe the change and why it belongs in this Agent Skill repository.

## Checklist

- [ ] The skill folder remains `skills/react-icons`.
- [ ] The skill name remains `react-icons`.
- [ ] Correct examples import icons from `react-icons/*` subpackages, not the root package.
- [ ] Unofficial status is preserved.
- [ ] New evals include `id`, `prompt`, and `expected_behavior`.
- [ ] No React app, dependency install, or package lockfile was added.

## Validation

Paste the relevant local checks or explain why they do not apply.
